core_philosophy: Patients need warmth, calm, trust. Avoid dark, techy, clinical vibes. Emphasize organic curves, soft shadows, and deep earthy colors.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1A2E25] font-light
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1A2E25]

interactions.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Wrap with generous padding. Rounded-xl borders.
components_strategy.buttons: Shadcn Button. Override to rounded-full. Primary uses #8BA888.
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn Recharts. Use monochromatic organic palette (various shades of #8BA888).
components_strategy.chat_interface: Custom flex layout. Needs explicit auto-scroll and wide readable container. Soft boundaries.
components_strategy.admin_dashboard: Use Shadcn Table for user management. Dense data, but wrap in rounded-2xl containers with #FFFFFF background.

image_urls.description: Soft organic green and beige abstract background. Use as a gentle backdrop for the marketing hero section.
Doctor talking to patient. Use in the 'About' or 'Why Us' section on the landing page.
Doctor writing on chart. Good for user dashboard empty states or medical history hero header.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building SusStyle AI Medical Helper, a SaaS platform combining patient chat and an admin dashboard.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Load 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
Ensure the entire app is built with mobile-first responsive utility classes. The design relies heavily on generous spacing.
For all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs), you MUST add 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='chat-submit-btn').
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) in Duotone weight for a softer, organic aesthetic.
Implement the landing page using raw HTML/Tailwind for bento-box layouts. Ensure direct children logic for Grid layouts.
Use Shadcn UI for the complex elements: Auth Forms, User Dashboard layout, Medical History tables, Settings dialogs.
Ensure files are generated as .js or .jsx, NOT .tsx.
The AI chat interface must use clear visual separation. Never use purely white background for both user and AI. AI should use a faint sage green tint (#8BA888/15).
